records.ety: [L., fr. nomen name + calare to call. See Name, and Calendar.]

defs: One who calls persons or things by their names.
notes: ☞ In Rome, candidates for office were attended each by a nomenclator, who informed the candidate of the names of the persons whom they met and whose votes it was desirable to solicit.

defs: One who gives names to things, or who settles and adjusts the nomenclature of any art or science; also, a list or vocabulary of technical names.
